events.name: New York Mets at Cincinnati Reds

highlights.headline: New York Mets vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights
highlights.description: New York Mets vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (New York Mets vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights) 2026/06/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Bo Bichette continued his hot streak with three hits, rookie Nolan McLean struck out nine in seven innings and the New York Mets averted being swept with a 9-1 victory over the Cincinnati Reds on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bichette has 3 hits, McLean strikes out 9 as Mets beat Reds 9-1 to avoid series sweep

highlights.description: Kansas City Royals vs. Washington Nationals: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Kansas City Royals vs. Washington Nationals: Game Highlights) 2026/06/17 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Luinder Avila took a shutout into the sixth, and the Kansas City Royals hit four solo homers in the first three innings of a 6-2 victory over the Washington Nationals on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Avila rebounds, taking a shutout into the 6th as the Royals beat Washington 6-2 to avoid a sweep

headlines.description: — Kyle Stowers homered twice and drove in five runs and the Miami Marlins avoided a series sweep with a 12-4 win over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stowers homers twice, drives in 5 runs to power the Marlins past the Phillies 12-4

headlines.description: — Jeremy Peña homered and had an RBI single, Peter Lambert allowed just one run on two hits and the Houston Astros beat the Detroit Tigers 4-2 on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jeremy Peña homers, Lambert allows 2 hits and Astros beat Tigers 4-2

headlines.description: — Fernando Tatis Jr. and Jackson Merrill each drove in two runs and finished with three hits as the San Diego Padres avoided a series sweep with a 6-1 win over the St. Louis Cardinals on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tatis and Merrill combine for 4 RBIs as the Padres beat the Cardinals 6-1

headlines.description: — Freddie Freeman hit a go-ahead, two-run homer in the sixth inning after the Tampa Bay Rays scored four runs off a banged-up Shohei Ohtani in the Los Angeles Dodgers' 5-4 win on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Freeman’s go-ahead 2-run homer rescues banged-up Ohtani in Dodgers' 5-4 win over Rays
